title: Experiment Create Request
description: POST /api/v1/experiments. Derived from the experiment resource schema to preserve field-level validation (status enum, nested configurations) but with the backend create required set [name, dataset_id, agent_id] (id is server-generated) and additionalProperties:true (backend ignores extras).

Infrastructure.description: Infrastructure configuration for running the experiment

infrastructure_id.description: Unique identifier for the infrastructure configuration

compute.description:
Type of compute resource to use:
- cpu: CPU-based computation
- gpu: GPU-accelerated computation

timeout.description: Maximum time in seconds before the experiment is terminated

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this infrastructure configuration was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this infrastructure configuration

Configurations.description: Complete configuration settings for the experiment

parameters.description: Dynamic parameters specific to this experiment

ExperimentListRunSummary.description: Compact latest experiment run summary embedded in experiment list responses

id.description: Unique identifier for the latest experiment run

run_id.description: Compatibility alias for the latest experiment run identifier

status.description: Current status of the latest experiment run

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last run update

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the run completed

configuration_runs_count.description: Number of configuration runs attached to this experiment run

summary_stats.description: Compact numeric latest-configuration summary for list views

metrics.description: Compact numeric latest-configuration measures for list views

id.description: Unique identifier for this experiment instance

name.description: Name of the experiment for identification

description.description: Detailed description of the experiment's purpose and methodology

status.description: Current execution status of the experiment

dataset_id.description: Canonical public identifier for the evaluation dataset being evaluated

eval_dataset_id.description: Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier

evaluation_set_id.description: Legacy alias for the evaluation dataset identifier

benchmark_id.description: Compatibility alias for the evaluation dataset identifier

agent_id.description: Reference to the agent performing the evaluation

model_parameters_id.description: Reference to the model parameters configuration

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this experiment was created

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the experiment execution started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the experiment execution completed

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to this experiment

agent.description: Full agent configuration performing the evaluation

model_parameters.description: Full model parameters configuration for the experiment

measures.description: List of measures used to evaluate performance

objectives.description: SDK-defined objective names, orientations, weights, and normalization defaults for this experiment

configuration_runs_count.description: Total number of configuration runs for this experiment in list responses

total_examples.description: Total examples processed across configuration runs for this experiment in list responses

optimization_runs_count.description: Total number of optimization/experiment runs for this experiment in list responses

experiment_run.description: Latest experiment run summary when available

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering experiments
